title: Jamaican Beef Skewers
description: Tender beef skewers infused with the bold flavors of Jamaica, perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together jerk seasoning, brown sugar, soy sauce (if using), and lemon juice.
3. Add beef cubes to the marinade, tossing to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
4. Remove beef from marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
5. Thread beef cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Grill skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until beef reaches 63°C.
7. During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush skewers with peanut oil and sprinkle with chopped peanuts and scallions.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
